---
title: "debug_discovery.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\debug_discovery.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 6
logic_score: 2.82
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.16
---

## Intent
The `debug_discovery.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on tokenize. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via tokenize. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `tokenize`
